name: Southern-Style Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees F (200 degrees C).
2. Place tortillas on a baking sheet.
3. Top each tortilla with some barbecued pork and sprinkle with mozzarella.
4. Bake for 8 to 10 minutes, or until bubbly and the tortilla is crisp.
Yield: 4 servings
